title: VIRTUAL ADULT INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT - 211info
text: CHARLIE HEALTH VIRTUAL ADULT INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual intensive outpatient counseling, including individual, group, and family therapy. Specialized tracks include trauma (such as survivors of sexual assault, domestic violence, and/or other complex trauma), LGBTQ2+, maternal mental health, and neurodivergent clients, including those with autism, ADHD, or other conditions, along with co-occurring mental health issues. Also provides participants with wrap-around support, including discharge planning, family support groups, and alumni support groups and events for participants. Also, provides specialized information and referrals on mental health resources. Eligibility: Ages 18-64 Hours: Intake: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Treatment: Varies by service Email (986) 206-0414 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (986) 206-0414 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid Coordinated Care Organizations (CCOs): CareOregon (HealthShare and Columbia Pacific), PacificSource Community Solutions Samaritan Health Plans (InterCommunity Health Network), Trillium Community Health Plan (Centene, Oregon), Umpqua Health Alliance, Yamhill Community Care Organization, and most major insurance plans. Limited scholarships and hardship waivers are available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Family Counseling Family Counseling * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Family Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues Family Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Family Counseling * Postpartum Mothers Family Counseling * Pregnant Individuals Group Counseling Group Counseling * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Group Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues Group Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Group Counseling * Postpartum Mothers Group Counseling * Pregnant Individuals Individual Counseling Individual Counseling * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Individual Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues Individual Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Individual Counseling * Postpartum Mothers Individual Counseling * Pregnant Individuals Specialized Information and Referral * Mental Health Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - VIRTUAL TEEN INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VIRTUAL INTENSIVE TREATMENT FOR EATING DISORDERS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - VIRTUAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS TREATMENT FOR TEENS AND ADULTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
